events.event_description: Albert William Sherer presents credentials as the first U.S. Ambassador to Equatorial Guinea, serving as a nonresident ambassador prior to the establishment of the embassy.

evidence.quote: Albert William Sherer, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1968-10-28. Credentials presented: 1968-11-21. Appointment terminated 1969-10-13. Note: Commissioned during a recess of the Senate; recommissioned on February 7, 1969, after confirmation. During Sherer's tenure as non-resident Ambassador, Embassy Santa Isabel (now Malabo) was established on August 1, 1969, with Albert N. Williams as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

events.event_description: Embassy Santa Isabel (now Malabo) established, elevating U.S. representation from nonresident ambassador to a resident embassy.

evidence.quote: During Sherer's tenure as non-resident Ambassador, Embassy Santa Isabel (now Malabo) was established on August 1, 1969, with Albert N. Williams as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

events.event_description: Ambassador Spiro is declared persona non grata by the Government of Equatorial Guinea, effectively ending resident U.S. diplomatic representation.

evidence.quote: Herbert John Spiro, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1975-07-24. Credentials presented: 1975-09-01. Declared persona non grata by Government of Equatorial Guinea 1976-03-14.

events.event_description: Mabel Murphy Smythe presents credentials as nonresident Ambassador to Equatorial Guinea, resuming U.S. ambassadorial relations after the break caused by Spiro's expulsion.

evidence.quote: Mabel Murphy Smythe, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1979-12-17. Credentials presented: 1979-12-19. Left Yaounde 1980-02-24.

events.event_description: Embassy Malabo reestablished during Horan's tenure as nonresident Ambassador, restoring a resident U.S. diplomatic mission.

evidence.quote: During Horan's tenure as non-resident Ambassador, Embassy Malabo was reestablished on June 11, 1981, with Joanne Thompson as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
